[fuse-open/fuselibs] 1 new commit pushed to _master_ by mortend
[fuse-open/fuselibs] New release <https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/releases/tag/v3.0.0-beta.10|Release - Fuselibs 3.0.0-beta.10> published by mortend
attachments.text:
## Install

```
npm install @fuse-open/fuselibs@3.0.0-beta.10

```

## Changes since v2.9.2

### Common

• Add `outputType` in project files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/commit/acbcee3102dd2447f4aabdf6284dca2065b50d69|acbcee3>)
• Update project and config files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/commit/85ff816e4e643212c78065e2df70f13e112f7d6a|85ff816>)
• Update `GLHelper.h` includes on Android (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/commit/2b143eba84a712ef53f0bda0bacded72e9424a95|2b143eb>)
• Simplify Android runtime version check (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1480|#1480>)
• Update macros and uxl files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1491|#1491>)
• Update unoproj syntax in doc-comments (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1493|#1493>)
• Switch default UI rendering on iOS and Android (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1502|#1502>)

### Experimental.TextureLoader

• Remove legacy `Experimental.TextureLoader` library (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1458|#1458>)

### Fuse.Camera

• Update permissions for Android 13 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1487|#1487>)

### Fuse.Common

• Remove obsolete methods and enum value (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1492|#1492>)  
   • `Fuse.Json.Escape(string s)`  
   • `Fuse.Json.Escape(string s, StringBuilder sb)`  
   • `Fuse.SystemFont.Weight.SemiBold`

### Fuse.Controls.CameraView

• Android: Fix Android 13 permission (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1496|#1496>)

### Fuse.Controls.Native

• Native ScrollView feature parity with the Graphics Mode (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1497|#1497>)
• Android: Fix native ScrollView where nested with horizontal ScrollView (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1500|#1500>)
• Native Video Component (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1501|#1501>)
• Native Slider Android: fix bug recursive setting value (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1504|#1504>)
• Android: Fix Scrollview with content padding (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1505|#1505>)
• Android: Native Scrollview snap min/max and bounce scroll (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1509|#1509>)
• Android: Scrolling detect Improvement (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1512|#1512>)

### Fuse.Controls.Primitives

• iOS: Fix crash when removing Shadow (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1498|#1498>)
• Fix bugs and improve native rendering for Image, Circle and Shadow (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1507|#1507>)

### Fuse.Controls.Video

• Upgrade `Fuse.Video.CIL` to .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1475|#1475>)

### Fuse.Controls.ScrollView

• ScrollView push to native for property changes (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1510|#1510>)

### Fuse.Drawing.Surface

• Update assembly references for .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1476|#1476>)

### Fuse.ImageTools

• Android: Fix Android 13 permission (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1499|#1499>)

### Fuse.LocalNotifications

• Android: Fix compatibility with the Android 13 and indentation (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1473|#1473>)

### Fuse.Maps

• iOS: Fix memory leaks with MapView (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1503|#1503>)
• Android: MapView sanitary check (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1511|#1511>)

### Fuse.Nodes

• Remove obsolete methods (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1492|#1492>)  
   • `Fuse.VisualBounds.Transform(float4x4 matrix)`  
   • `Fuse.VisualBounds.TransformFlatten(float4x4 matrix)`  
   • `Fuse.VisualBounds.BoxTransform(Box box, float4x4 transform)`
• Android: Fix crash on layout transformation (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1506|#1506>)

### Fuse.Scripting

• Deprecate `NativePromise` without `Context` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1467|#1467>)
• Remove obsolete methods (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1492|#1492>)  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.IThreadWorker.Invoke(Uno.Action action)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.Context.Invoke(Uno.Action action)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.ModuleResult.Object`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.ModuleResult.Exports`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.NativeEvent.RaiseAsync(params object[] args)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.Object.InstanceOf(Function type)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.Object.CallMethod(string name, params object[] args)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.Function.Call(params object[] args)`  
   • `Fuse.Scripting.Function.Construct(params object[] args)`

### Fuse.Scripting.JavaScript

• TypeScript and transpiler support in UX files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1472|#1472>)
• Upgrade `<http://V8Simple.net|V8Simple.net>` for .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1483|#1483>)

### Polyfills.Window

• Blob and URL polyfill, enhance fetch, and sanitary check (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1508|#1508>)

### Other changes

• Upgrade `Fuse.Profiling` tool to .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1474|#1474>)
• Upgrade `android-build-tools` to v2.x (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1488|#1488>)
• Ignore tests failing on macOS (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1484|#1484>)
• Kill tests after 15 minutes (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1489|#1489>)
• OS X -> macOS clean up (<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/pull/1495|#1495>)

<https://github.com/fuse-open/fuselibs/compare/v2.9.2...v3.0.0-beta.10|`v2.9.2...v3.0.0-beta.10`>
